cards.title: Legal & Business Applications
cards.content:
• Married Women's Property (MWP) Act, 1874
• Keyman Insurance (Business Protection)
• Mortgage Redemption Insurance (MRI)

cards.title: 1. Section 6 - The Trust
cards.content: Creates a 'Trust' for wife/children. The policyholder loses control—cannot surrender or take a loan without trustee consent.

cards.title: 2. Protection from Creditors
cards.content: CRITICAL: The money is 100% protected from the husband's creditors and court attachments. Even parents/relatives cannot claim it.

cards.title: 3. Keyman Insurance
cards.content: Taken by Employer on the life of an important employee. Premium is a business expense. Claim is paid to the EMPLOYER, not the family.

cards.title: 4. Mortgage Redemption (MRI)
cards.content: A Decreasing Term Insurance. Cover decreases as the loan amount decreases. Pays off the loan directly to the bank if the borrower dies.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: MWP Act Protection: Protects from creditors/court attachments.
MRI Policy Type: Decreasing Term Insurance.
MWP Trustee Consent: Needed for any changes to the policy.

cards.title: Q1. Primary goal of MWP Act?
Q2. Who pays & receives in Keyman?
